claim_bullets.bullet_text: A block with no statements returns undefined (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.34-34).
A block can be placed to the right of an arrow (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.34-34).
A block is a sequence of statements separated by semicolons (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.34-34).

source_record_text: The simplest possible block in JavaScript Allongé is a block with no statements, which returns the result of evaluating that block.
